subcodes.first_line: O friends! When souls pass from this world unto another world, they are even as a child that departeth from the narrow confines of the mother's womb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ياران چون از اين جهان بجهان ديگر روند مانند طفليست که از رحم مادر ، مسکن تنگ
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
